content.raw:
Events I build, host & speak at

I don't just attend the AI conversation — I host the room.

From a monthly Vancouver meetup to film-club screenings, weekly office hours, and keynote stages from São Paulo to Whistler — these are the rooms where BC's AI community actually shows up, argues, makes things, and leaves braver. Most run on Luma; come find the next one.

Follow on Luma Book Kris to speak

Series I produce & host

The rooms I build and keep building.

Not one-off panels — recurring rituals with their own crowds, collaborators, and momentum.

Monthly · Vancouver

Vancouver AI Community Meetup

The flagship night I host and curate — builders, artists, founders, and the curious in one room every month. Demos, talks, arguments, and the occasional Squatchie Award. The heartbeat of the local scene.

Host & curatorMonthlyCommunity
See upcoming meetups

Weekly · Online

BC + AI Office Hours

Every Friday, an open working session for the BC + AI ecosystem — questions, show-and-tell, and practical help moving real AI work forward. The connective tissue between the big monthly rooms.

HostWeeklyMembers
Join BC + AI on Luma About BC + AI

Monthly · Multimodal Media Lab

AI Film Club

Co-led with Kevin Friel and Luke Minaker — monthly screenings and hands-on accelerators for filmmakers staying human while the tools get good at everything. Building toward the 2nd Annual BC + AI Film Festival in October 2026.

Co-hostScreeningsAccelerators
See film events

Ongoing · BC + AI

The special-interest groups

The deeper-end rooms inside the ecosystem: Mind, AI & Consciousness (MAC) deepdives, the AI + Education SIG, and the AI Ethical Futures Lab — plus regional chapters spinning up beyond Vancouver.

MAC deepdivesAI + EducationEthical Futures
Explore BC + AI

Stages I speak on

Keynotes, festivals, and the rooms that travel.

A few recent ones — several with the full talk on tape.

São Paulo · Keynote

World AI Film Festival Brasil

Opening keynote — "How to keep our souls intact when the machines get really good at making everything." The Both Hands Full framework for filmmakers, students, and creative technologists.

See speaking topics

Vancouver · Keynote

LaSalle College

"Both Hands Full: what creatives actually need to know about AI." A graduation-season keynote on staying human, useful, and employable as the tools accelerate.

Watch the keynote

Whistler · Speaker series

Whistler Institute Global Speaker Series

"Inside Vancouver's AI Boom" — the local scene as a case study in building AI culture that's practical, ethical, and alive instead of hype-driven.

Watch the talk

Conference · Keynote

ChannelNext

"The future of humanity: chaos & creativity" — a keynote that ends in a live, on-stage AI synthesis of the whole conference. The kind of risk that only works live.

Watch the keynote

Web Summit Vancouver

Calm Before the Storm

The community night I host on the eve of the big conferences — Web Summit, SIGGRAPH — so the locals own the room before the circus arrives.

See the next one

Signature moments

The nights people still talk about.

The Thinking Game premiere

A documentary night at the Space Centre theatre with the AI Salon — big screen, bigger conversation.

The Squatchie Awards

The community's tongue-in-cheek year-end recognition — Vancouver AI's answer to an awards show.

Holiday Social / BC + AI Festivus

The end-of-year gathering where the whole ecosystem (and a birthday or two) collides.

Bring me to your stage — or your city

Come to a room, or let's build one.

Follow along on Luma for what's next, or bring a keynote, workshop, or community build to your event.

Follow on Luma Book Kris to speak

jetpack-related-posts.title: AI Keynote Speaker Kris Krüg
jetpack-related-posts.author: Kris Krüg
jetpack-related-posts.excerpt: AI keynotes, workshops, and culture-shifting rooms I help audiences meet AI with courage, taste, and usable imagination. I am an AI keynote speaker, creative technologist, photographer, and community builder. My talks mix live demos, field stories, creative rebellion, practical workflows, and the hard questions about power, taste, trust, memory, and…

jetpack-related-posts.title: Responsible AI Professional Certification
jetpack-related-posts.author: Krüg
jetpack-related-posts.excerpt: Responsible AI Professional Everyone’s shipping AI fast. Almost nobody’s doing it responsibly. This fixes that. RAP is a four-week certification that closes the gap between how fast we deploy AI and how slowly we get responsible about it. Built by BC + AI with The Upgrade — cohort-based, framework-driven, and…

jetpack-related-posts.title: Podcast Guest, AI Commentator, Event Host
jetpack-related-posts.author: Krüg
jetpack-related-posts.excerpt: Podcasts, broadcast, produced interviews, panels, hosting Bring me in when your audience needs AI to sound human, useful, and alive. I am an AI keynote speaker, creative technologist, photographer, community builder, podcast guest, broadcast commentator, host, moderator, and emcee. I help audiences understand generative AI without sanding off the weird,…

jetpack-related-posts.title: Kris Krüg’s MØTLEYKRÜG Podcast
jetpack-related-posts.author: Krüg
jetpack-related-posts.excerpt: Welcome to MØTLEYKRÜG the cyberpunk symphony that challenges the status quo and unites rebels of art, technology, and alternative living.

img.alt_text: Digital Self & the Era of AI: Avatars, ChatBots, & Audio Cloning

jetpack-related-posts.title: About Kris Krüg
jetpack-related-posts.author: Kris Krüg
jetpack-related-posts.excerpt: My name is Kris Krug – a boundary-pushing Creative Explorer, an intuitive Tech Whisperer, and a tenacious Culture Hacker. In the fabric of the digital era, where technology often overshadows humanity, I've taken it upon myself to chart a different course. I’m on a relentless mission to humanize technology, to…

jetpack-related-posts.title: Cinematic Podcasts: Hollywood-Grade Storytelling Meets Generative AI
jetpack-related-posts.author: Krüg
jetpack-related-posts.excerpt: Your Story, Reimagined for the AI Age Your business, brand, or community has a story to tell, and telling it right matters more than ever. In a digital world saturated with content, standing out requires cinematic quality, seamless execution, and a touch of generative AI magic. We’ve distilled the complexity…
